item.title: C'est une exception française, 99% des crédits immobiliers sont à taux fixe: les nouvelles règles européennes pourraient y mettre fin (pour protéger les banques) https://www.bfmtv.com/economie/entrepr
item.description: pC'est une exception française, 99% des crédits immobiliers sont à taux fixe: les nouvelles règles européennes pourraient y mettre fin (pour protéger les banques) br /a href="https://www.bfmtv.com/economie/entreprises/assurance-banque/c-est-une-exception-francaise-99-des-credits-immobiliers-sont-a-t

item.description: p🌆 Market News Digestbr /[Jul 21, 2026 EST]br /br /🔥 Top Storiesbr /• Oil spikes on Middle East escalation — Brent topped $91 as U.S.-Iran tensions, Houthi threats and tanker disruptions lifted energy prices and inflation fearsbr /• Trump ups pressure on Iran — said strikes/blockade actions may cont

item.title: $SMCI SUPER MICRO COMPUTER Q4 UPDATE SEES Q4 REV. NEAR LOW END OF $11B TO $12.5B RANGE SEES GAAP AND NON-GAAP GROSS MARGIN 15% TO 17%, VS. PRIOR GUIDANCE 8.2% TO 8.4% GROSS MARGIN ABOVE PRIOR GUIDANCE
item.description: pa href="https://nitter.net/search?f=tweets&amp;q=%23SMCI"$SMCI/a SUPER MICRO COMPUTER Q4 UPDATEbr /br /SEES Q4 REV. NEAR LOW END OF $11B TO $12.5B RANGEbr /SEES GAAP AND NON-GAAP GROSS MARGIN 15% TO 17%, VS. PRIOR GUIDANCE 8.2% TO 8.4%br /GROSS MARGIN ABOVE PRIOR GUIDANCE DUE TO FAVORABLE CUSTOMER

item.title: Nintendo customers have no legal right to tariff refunds, company tells judge
item.description: Nintendo says Switch buyers got what they paid for, urges court to dismiss lawsuit.

item.title: KAN 11 REPORTER: REPORTS FROM UNOFFICIAL SOURCES IN IRAQ INDICATE THAT THREE AMERICAN HELICOPTERS DROPPED OFF FORCES IN THE AL-BADIA DESERT IN IRAQ. AFTER ABOUT AN HOUR, THE HELICOPTERS TOOK OFF AGAIN
item.description: pKAN 11 REPORTER: REPORTS FROM UNOFFICIAL SOURCES IN IRAQ INDICATE THAT THREE AMERICAN HELICOPTERS DROPPED OFF FORCES IN THE AL-BADIA DESERT IN IRAQ. AFTER ABOUT AN HOUR, THE HELICOPTERS TOOK OFF AGAIN AND FLEW IN THE DIRECTION OF JORDAN. br /br /דיווחים ממקורות לא רשמיים בעיראק לפיהם שלושה הליקופטר

item.title: U.S. STRIKE THREAT RAISES HORMUZ RISKS KALSHI PREDICTION MARKETS SUGGEST TRADERS EXPECT DISRUPTIONS IN THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ TO PERSIST WELL INTO 2027, WITH ONLY A 31% CHANCE OF SHIPPING RETURNING TO N
item.description: pU.S. STRIKE THREAT RAISES HORMUZ RISKSbr /br /KALSHI PREDICTION MARKETS SUGGEST TRADERS EXPECT DISRUPTIONS IN THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ TO PERSIST WELL INTO 2027, WITH ONLY A 31% CHANCE OF SHIPPING RETURNING TO NORMAL BEFORE DECEMBER 2026.br /br /PRESIDENT DONALD TRUMP SAID THE U.S. WILL TARGET THE PICK

item.title: OIL HITS FIVE-WEEK HIGH ON MIDDLE EAST ESCALATION OIL PRICES ROSE ABOUT 2% TO A FIVE-WEEK HIGH AS RENEWED U.S.-IRAN ATTACKS AND HOUTHI THREATS TO BLOCKADE SAUDI SHIPPING FUELED CONCERNS OVER GLOBAL EN
item.description: pOIL HITS FIVE-WEEK HIGH ON MIDDLE EAST ESCALATIONbr /br /OIL PRICES ROSE ABOUT 2% TO A FIVE-WEEK HIGH AS RENEWED U.S.-IRAN ATTACKS AND HOUTHI THREATS TO BLOCKADE SAUDI SHIPPING FUELED CONCERNS OVER GLOBAL ENERGY SUPPLIES. BRENT CRUDE CLIMBED ABOVE $91 A BARREL, WHILE TANKERS CARRYING SAUDI OIL REVE
